title: Karma (EADF2026)
synopsis:
A deliciously cynical tragicomedy born from the meat grinder of modern capitalism. A judicial scrivener specializing in bankruptcy ironically drowns in debt himself after a stock and crypto crash. To salvage the family, his poet son, the director, buries his artistic dreams to become a disgruntled assistant in his father’s bleak office. Trapped in a war of mutual resentment and toxic co-dependence, their absurd reality mirrors the title Karma: they can only survive their own ruin by orchestrating the financial salvation of others. International Premiere.

 

Special Jury Prize for Korean Competition and Documentary Award, Jeonju International Film Festival

synopsis_lang.en:
A deliciously cynical tragicomedy born from the meat grinder of modern capitalism. A judicial scrivener specializing in bankruptcy ironically drowns in debt himself after a stock and crypto crash. To salvage the family, his poet son, the director, buries his artistic dreams to become a disgruntled assistant in his father’s bleak office. Trapped in a war of mutual resentment and toxic co-dependence, their absurd reality mirrors the title Karma: they can only survive their own ruin by orchestrating the financial salvation of others. International Premiere.

 

Special Jury Prize for Korean Competition and Documentary Award, Jeonju International Film Festival
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
專職幫人重組債務的法務士父親，自己竟因炒股與加密貨幣失敗而面臨破產。曾夢想成為詩人的導演兒子，為了不讓父親債台高築摧毀全家，唯有向現實低頭，親手埋葬詩人夢，搬進這間全城最絕望的事務所當廉價助手。看似是孝子救父的溫馨故事，實則是在地獄火海般的負債生活中，一邊互相怨恨，一邊圍爐取暖，打着日復一日的心理泥沼戰。英文片名《KARMA》直指「業障」，精妙隱喻了現實的諷刺：他們唯有透過協助他人解脫債務，才能擺脫自身的詛咒。 本片五月在全州獲獎後，隨即登陸香港作國際首映。

 

全州國際電影節 韓國競賽評審特別獎及紀錄片獎

subtitle: English
